tasks.description: Scaffold Mastra service directory with manual setup (no create-mastra).
steps: Create `mastra/` directory in monorepo root

Create `mastra/package.json` with: name `@siestai/mastra`, scripts (`dev`: `mastra dev`, `build`: `mastra build`), dependencies: `@mastra/core@latest`, `@mastra/pg@latest`, `drizzle-orm`, `pg`, `zod@^4`. devDependencies: `typescript`, `@types/node`, `mastra@latest`, `drizzle-kit`, `tsx`
Create `mastra/tsconfig.json`: target ES2022, module ES2022, moduleResolution bundler, strict true, skipLibCheck true, noEmit true, include ["src/**/*"]
Create `mastra/.env.example` with `DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/siestai` and `OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-...`
Run `cd mastra && pnpm install` to verify deps resolve
tasks.verify: cd mastra && pnpm install && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20

tasks.description: Create Drizzle schema for custom agents table with AgentSource pgEnum.
steps: Create `mastra/src/db/schema.ts` â€” define `agentSourceEnum` as `pgEnum('agent_source', ['mastra', 'livekit', 'external'])`

Define `agents` table with `pgTable`: `id` (uuid pk, default gen_random_uuid()), `name` (varchar(100), not null), `description` (text, default ''), `instructions` (text, not null), `category` (varchar(50), default 'conversational'), `tags` (jsonb, default '[]'), `color` (varchar(7), default '#3b82f6'), `icon` (varchar(50), default 'bot'), `source` (agentSourceEnum, default 'mastra'), `llm_model` (varchar(100)), `is_online` (boolean, default true), `created_at` (timestamp, default now()), `updated_at` (timestamp, default now())
Create `mastra/src/db/index.ts` â€” init Drizzle client: `import { drizzle } from 'drizzle-orm/node-postgres'`, create with `process.env.DATABASE_URL`, export `db` and re-export schema
Create `mastra/drizzle.config.ts` â€” schema path `./src/db/schema.ts`, driver `pg`, dbCredentials from DATABASE_URL, out `./drizzle`
Add `generate` and `migrate` scripts to package.json: `drizzle-kit generate` and `drizzle-kit migrate`
tasks.verify: cd mastra && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | head -20

tasks.description: Create agent CRUD functions using Drizzle queries.
steps: Create `mastra/src/agents/agent-crud.ts`
Implement `listAgents(params?: { category?: string; search?: string })` â€” select from agents table, filter by category with `eq()`, filter by search with `or(ilike(name), ilike(description))`
Implement `getAgent(id: string)` â€” select where id equals, throw if not found
Implement `createAgent(data)` â€” insert into agents, return inserted row. Validate: name required, instructions required
Implement `updateAgent(id: string, data: Partial)` â€” update agents set fields where id, set updated_at to now(), return updated row
Implement `deleteAgent(id: string)` â€” delete from agents where id
tasks.verify: cd mastra && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | head -20

tasks.description: Create Mastra entry point with registered agents and custom CRUD API routes.
steps: Create `mastra/src/mastra/agents/default-agent.ts` â€” export a default `Agent` with id 'default-agent', basic instructions, model 'openai/gpt-4.1-mini'
Create `mastra/src/mastra/index.ts` â€” import `Mastra` from '@mastra/core', import `registerApiRoute` from '@mastra/core/server', import `PostgresStore` from '@mastra/pg'
Configure Mastra instance: `storage: new PostgresStore({ id: 'siestai-storage', connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL })`, register default agent in `agents` map

Add custom API routes via `server.apiRoutes` using `registerApiRoute()`: GET /custom/agents (listAgents), GET /custom/agents/:id (getAgent), POST /custom/agents (createAgent), PUT /custom/agents/:id (updateAgent), DELETE /custom/agents/:id (deleteAgent)
Each route handler: get request body/params from Hono context `c`, call the CRUD function, return `c.json(result)`
Export the `mastra` instance as default export
tasks.verify: cd mastra && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | head -20

tasks.description: Add dynamic agent streaming â€” load agent config from DB and stream via Mastra Agent.
steps: Create `mastra/src/agents/runtime.ts` â€” function `createRuntimeAgent(dbRecord)`: takes an agent DB row, returns `new Agent({ id: record.id, name: record.name, instructions: record.instructions, model: record.llm_model || 'openai/gpt-4.1-mini' })`
Add custom route POST /custom/agents/:id/stream via `registerApiRoute()` in the Mastra config

Route handler: read agent from DB with `getAgent(id)`, call `createRuntimeAgent(agent)`, get messages from request body, call `agent.stream(messages)`, use `toAISDKStream()` or pipe textStream to response
The response should be SSE-compatible for the Vercel AI SDK on the frontend
tasks.verify: cd mastra && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | head -20

tasks.description: Add agents module to NestJS backend that proxies CRUD and streaming to the Mastra service.
steps: Install `@nestjs/axios` and `axios` in backend: `cd backend && pnpm add @nestjs/axios axios`
Create `backend/src/agents/agents.module.ts` â€” import HttpModule.register({ baseURL: process.env.MASTRA_URL || 'http://localhost:4111' })

Create `backend/src/agents/agents.service.ts` â€” inject HttpService, implement: listAgents(params?), getAgent(id), createAgent(data), updateAgent(id, data), deleteAgent(id) â€” each calls Mastra's /custom/agents endpoints
Add `streamAgent(id, messages)` method â€” makes POST to Mastra `/custom/agents/:id/stream`, returns the response stream
Create `backend/src/agents/agents.controller.ts` â€” REST endpoints: GET /agents, GET /agents/:id, POST /agents, PUT /agents/:id, DELETE /agents/:id, POST /agents/:id/stream (passthrough SSE)

Create `backend/src/agents/dto/create-agent.dto.ts` â€” name (required, max 100), instructions (required), description (optional), category (optional), source (optional, IsIn ['mastra','livekit','external']), tags (optional array), color (optional), icon (optional), llm_model (optional)
Create `backend/src/agents/dto/update-agent.dto.ts` â€” PartialType of CreateAgentDto
Import `AgentsModule` in `app.module.ts`
Add `MASTRA_URL=http://localhost:4111` to `backend/.env.example`
tasks.verify: cd backend && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | head -20

tasks.description: Update frontend types and API client â€” remove mock data, add real backend calls.
steps: Update `ui-web/src/lib/types.ts`: add `AgentSource` type ('mastra' | 'livekit' | 'external'), remove voice fields from Agent interface (voice_id, preset_voice, stt_provider, llm_provider, tts_provider, tts_engine, tts_cloud_provider, voice_name, call_count), add `source: AgentSource` field

Rewrite `ui-web/src/lib/api.ts`: remove all MOCK_AGENTS and MOCK_SESSIONS arrays, replace listAgents with real fetch to `${API_BASE_URL}/agents` with query params, replace getAgent with real fetch to `${API_BASE_URL}/agents/:id`
Add methods: `createAgent(data)` â†’ POST /agents, `updateAgent(id, data)` â†’ PUT /agents/:id, `deleteAgent(id)` â†’ DELETE /agents/:id
Keep `getAgentName` as an async function that calls getAgent and returns name
Update `ui-web/src/components/agents/agent-card.tsx`: remove references to `call_count` and `voice_name`, remove Phone icon import if only used for call_count. Add source badge if source !== 'mastra'
Fix any resulting TypeScript errors in agents page and other consumers of the Agent type
tasks.verify: cd ui-web && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | head -20

tasks.description: Add Create/Edit Agent dialog and delete functionality to the Agents page.
steps: Create `ui-web/src/components/agents/agent-form-dialog.tsx` â€” modal form for creating/editing agents

Fields: name (Input), description (Input), instructions (Textarea), category (Select from AGENT_CATEGORIES), color (preset color picker from AGENT_CARD_COLORS), icon (Input), source (Select: mastra/livekit/external), llm_model (Input)
Reuse existing shadcn Dialog, Input, Select, Textarea, Label, Button components
Props: `open`, `onOpenChange`, `agent?: Agent` (for edit mode), `onSaved: () => void`
On submit: call `api.createAgent()` or `api.updateAgent()` depending on mode, then call `onSaved()`
In `ui-web/src/app/agents/page.tsx`: wire 'Create Agent' button to open the dialog, add state for dialog open/edit agent
Add edit button and delete button to `AgentCard` with confirmation dialog for delete
Delete calls `api.deleteAgent(id)` then refreshes the list
tasks.verify: cd ui-web && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | head -20

tasks.description: Create AgentPicker component and wire into arena setup Step 1.
steps: Create `ui-web/src/components/arena/agent-picker.tsx` â€” fetches agents from `api.listAgents()` on mount
Toggle-select UI: each agent card shows name, color dot, description, category. Clicking toggles selection. Max 4 agents. Show selected count badge.
Props: `selectedAgents: Agent[]`, `onSelectionChange: (agents: Agent[]) => void`, `maxAgents?: number` (default 4)
In `ui-web/src/app/arena/page.tsx`: add state `selectedAgents: Agent[]`, render AgentPicker in Step 1 when configMode === 'agents' (replace the placeholder dashed-border div)
For configMode === 'manual': add simple inline form to define 2-4 agents with name + instructions fields (no voice). Store as `manualAgents: { name: string; instructions: string }[]`
Update `canProceedFromStep(1)` to require at least 2 agents: `configMode === 'agents' ? selectedAgents.length >= 2 : manualAgents.filter(a => a.name && a.instructions).length >= 2`
In `handleStartConversation`: build `nativeAgents` array from selectedAgents (map to `{ name, agentId: id, instructions }`) or manualAgents, pass to `createSession({ ..., nativeAgents })`
Update the Summary section in Step 3 to show selected agent names and count
tasks.verify: cd ui-web && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | head -20

tasks.description: Add PostgreSQL to docker-compose for dev and staging.
steps: Create `docker-compose.dev.yml` â€” postgres service: image postgres:16-alpine, port 5432:5432, volume pgdata, env POSTGRES_DB=siestai, POSTGRES_USER=postgres, POSTGRES_PASSWORD=postgres
Add `postgres` service to `docker-compose.staging.yml` (create if not exists): image postgres:16-alpine, volume, POSTGRES_DB/USER/PASSWORD env vars

Create `mastra/Dockerfile` â€” FROM node:20-alpine, WORKDIR /app, COPY package.json pnpm-lock.yaml, RUN npm i -g pnpm && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile, COPY . ., RUN pnpm build, CMD ["node", ".mastra/output/index.mjs"]
Add `mastra` service to staging compose: build from `mastra/`, depends_on postgres, DATABASE_URL env pointing to postgres service, OPENAI_API_KEY from env
Update `backend` service in staging compose: add `MASTRA_URL=http://mastra:4111` env var
Update or create `.env.staging.example` with DATABASE_URL, MASTRA_URL, OPENAI_API_KEY

tasks.description: Create seed script with default test agents and run Drizzle migrations.
steps: Create `mastra/src/scripts/seed.ts` â€” imports Drizzle db and schema

Insert 4 agents: Atlas (technical, source:mastra, color:#3b82f6, model:openai/gpt-4.1-mini), Nova (creative, source:mastra, color:#8b5cf6), Sage (conversational, source:mastra, color:#22c55e), Axiom (debate, source:mastra, color:#ef4444)
Each agent has meaningful instructions, category, color, icon, llm_model
Use `INSERT ... ON CONFLICT (name) DO NOTHING` pattern for idempotency (add unique constraint on name in schema if needed)
Add `seed` script to `mastra/package.json`: `tsx src/scripts/seed.ts`
Add `db:setup` script that runs `drizzle-kit migrate && tsx src/scripts/seed.ts`
Document in README or .env.example: run `docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d` then `cd mastra && pnpm db:setup`
tasks.verify: cd mastra && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | head -20
